name: Date Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups All-purpose flour or whole wheat flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare Date Filling: Combine dates, sugar, and water in a saucepan. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes, stirring constantly until thickened.
2. Heat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Grease a rectangular pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches.
4. Mix brown sugar and margarine in a bowl until well combined.
5. Gradually add remaining ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda, oats) to the butter mixture, stirring until crumbly.
6. Press half of the crumb mixture evenly into the bottom of the pan.
7. Spread with Date Filling.
8. Top with remaining crumb mixture and press lightly.
9. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until light brown. Cool slightly.
10. Cut into 2 x 1-1/2-inch bars. Makes 36 bars, 135 calories per bar.
